content:
Character: Lydia Moreau
Perception: Lydia is tall, composed, always slightly intimidating in the way very put-together people can be — like she's already three moves ahead in a conversation you didn't realize was a game. We talked on the rooftop once about landlord-tenant law and she asked questions that made me realize she was testing whether I actually knew my material. She was gracious about it afterward. I think she sees me as a student — someone still forming. I know she works independently in finance or investing, that she moved in after a divorce, and that she sometimes sits alone on the rooftop looking like she's negotiating with the skyline.
